description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Boneti Bizcochuelo, a chocolate-flavored cake mix. The front of the box features a large, appetizing image of a slice of chocolate cake with cream filling, set against a turquoise background with swirling patterns and prominent branding. The sides of the box display product information, including ingredients and preparation instructions, with gold and white text on a dark background. The back of the box provides step-by-step preparation instructions, illustrated with images of muffins and cakes, and highlights the absence of artificial colors and preservatives. The box is sealed and designed for retail sale, with a net weight of 540 grams indicated on the front. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a focus on the chocolate flavor and ease of preparation.
description: A turquoise and brown Boneti Bizcochuelo chocolate cake mix box featuring a large cake image and detailed preparation instructions.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Boneti branding, a large slice of chocolate cake, and key product highlights such as flavor and weight.
description_view_1: The left side displays product type, flavor, and two gold rectangles likely for additional information or branding.
description_view_2: The back view provides illustrated preparation steps, ingredient highlights, and images of finished baked goods.
description_view_3: The right side lists ingredients, manufacturer details, and certification logos in white and gold text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Boneti brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and top of the box in white script against a turquoise background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box states 'Sabor Chocolate' and features a large image of chocolate cake, clearly indicating chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Ingredients and some nutritional information are visible on the right side of the box in white text.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A red circular badge on the front highlights '60 años' (60 years), and another badge indicates '100% calidad', serving as promotional graphics.
